allowed_uses: record open-source Pine strategy metadata, license, parameters, and attribution
capture TradingView Strategy Tester summary metrics as external evidence
translate visible Pine rules into local specs for OS reproduction
bias_risks: TradingView data and broker-emulator fills can diverge from OS canonical data
open-source license may permit private study but still require attribution or reuse limits
notes: Only open-source/visible-code strategies are eligible for code reproduction.
Protected and invite-only scripts remain metadata-only or excluded unless explicit permission exists.
TradingView Strategy Tester metrics are retained as external evidence, never approval proof.

commission_and_slippage.value: Strategy properties expose commission and slippage settings that must be captured beside every external result.

initial_capital.value: Strategy properties expose capital assumptions that must be captured.

license_or_reuse_status.value: Open-source Pine publications require attribution/license capture before any local reuse; protected and invite-only code must not be copied.

max_drawdown.value: Performance Summary exposes drawdown metrics; local OS validation remains authoritative.

net_profit.value: Performance Summary exposes net profit; this is external evidence only.

parameter_visibility.value: Input parameters must be captured when visible; hidden or protected parameters block faithful reproduction.

pine_version.value: Pine version must be captured from the visible strategy source when available.

profit_factor.value: Strategy Tester exposes profit factor where enough trades exist.

script_access_type.value: TradingView publications can be open-source, protected, or invite-only; only visible open-source code is eligible for local code reproduction.

script_title.value: Public strategy-library entries expose per-script titles; exact title must be captured from each individual strategy URL.

symbol.value: Strategy Tester evidence is chart-specific; symbol must be captured from the tested chart or report.

tester_date_range.value: Strategy Tester reports depend on the chart's available history and configured date range; both must be retained when visible.

timeframe.value: Strategy Tester evidence is timeframe-specific and must be captured with the report.

trade_count.value: Strategy Tester exposes trade counts that help compare TV and OS fills.

win_rate.value: Strategy Tester exposes win-rate metrics; they are not inherited proof.

source_title: TradingView open-source public strategies and Strategy Tester reports
validation_prerequisites: canonical source snapshot and license/attribution record
exact Pine-to-local rule translation with ambiguity record
local backtest on approved frozen data using declared cost grid
G10 multiple-testing evidence before any promotion claim
